body: TUNGSTEN SMITHING -- pass 28 report. Shipped WARRANT#41 -> SLS(56)/9.70: forge-parallel Wave 0 (agent 4s first code). ForgeScorecard (the canonical scorecard shape all 4 theses name identically), champion register, and a real, traceable ForgeRatchetPromote decision rule -- rejects underpowered challengers, requires EV to beat the champion by a stated minimum edge AND non-inferior on every guardrail AND a PBO bar that tightens as more challengers are tried. Plus a 3-zone ceiling-awareness classifier. This is the decision mechanism only -- no live scorecard exists yet since nothing has calibrated this session; populating one for real needs reading the existing ghost-gate code properly, flagged as a separate future warrant. Compiled clean, identity invariant verified. Continuing to forge-indicate r5 (threshold-to-target) next.
